framework.name: Visa's Auth Model = Role-Based Access Control, Not Signed Intent
framework.description: Visa's Acceptance Agent Toolkit enforces 'policies and role-based access controls by design' — this is fundamentally OAuth/RBAC-style delegation, NOT cryptographic intent signing like Mastercard's Verifiable Intent. Visa is treating agent auth as an extension of existing access control patterns rather than inventing a new authorization primitive for autonomous agents.
framework.raw_quote: All policies and role-based access controls are enforced by design.

source.title: Visa advances agentic commerce with developer updates | Visa
